description: Recommandations pour le prochain run. Mis a jour par la Sentinelle au FINALIZE. Lu par /team au Step 2.

recommendations.description: Fix path-to-regexp@8.2.0 ReDoS (GHSA-j3q9-mxjg-w52f). Add pnpm.overrides to path-to-regexp@>=8.4.0 in museum-backend/package.json.
recommendations.source: R16 audit — SCAN-devops, confirmed by Sentinelle

recommendations.description: Fix langsmith@0.3.87 SSRF (GHSA-v34v-rq6j-cj6p). Add pnpm.overrides to langsmith@>=0.4.6 in museum-backend/package.json.
recommendations.source: R16 audit — SCAN-devops, confirmed by Sentinelle

recommendations.description: Hash password reset tokens with SHA-256 before DB storage. Currently stored plaintext in reset_token column (forgotPassword.useCase.ts). Compare hashed values on lookup (user.repository.pg.ts).
recommendations.source: R16 audit — SCAN-security, upgraded to HIGH by Sentinelle

recommendations.description: Wire LLMCircuitBreaker into production path or remove dead code. File exists at src/modules/chat/adapters/secondary/llm-circuit-breaker.ts but has zero imports.
recommendations.source: R16 audit — SCAN-langchain, confirmed by Sentinelle

recommendations.description: Add supertest HTTP route tests for auth + chat routes minimum. 1737L of route handler code at 0% branch coverage. Single largest coverage gap blocking 60% target.
recommendations.source: R16 audit — SCAN-tests, confirmed by Sentinelle

recommendations.description: Frontend route files still bypass application layer (13 infrastructure imports in routes per R16 audit). conversations.tsx and settings.tsx now clean (R15), but 11 other routes remain.
image-storage.s3.ts remains at 720L. Further decomposition (presigned URL, batch ops, HTTP layer) possible but lower ROI.
recommendations.source: R15 refactor — Sentinelle REVIEW+TEST gate WARN

recommendations.description: i18n keys for a11y labels — 100% parity achieved across 8 locales (497 keys).
recommendations.source: R16 audit — confirmed by team-lead scan

recommendations.description: Verifier EP-015 fix (anti-hallucination) via meta-test MT-001
Verifier scope boundary enforcement via meta-test MT-002
recommendations.verifiedAt: R15 — MT-002 PASS: 0 scope violations across both agents

recommendations.description: Calibrer gate leniency via meta-test MT-003 (introduire 1 defaut delibere)
recommendations.verifiedAt: R15 — MT-003 PASS: 5 WARNs across 4 gates
